UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user of the NEU LabTrack application, including professors and administrators. This entity stores core profile information and access-related flags.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity. This typically corresponds to the Firebase Authentication UID.

name.description: The full name of the user as provided by their institutional account.

email.description: The institutional email address of the user (must be from the @neu.edu.ph domain).

role.description: The assigned role of the user within the application, determining their access level and dashboard. Can be 'Professor' or 'Admin'.

qrString.description: A unique string specifically generated for professors, used to create their identification QR code for scanning during lab usage logging.

isBlocked.description: A boolean flag indicating whether the user's access to the application, particularly lab usage logging, has been revoked by an administrator.

createdAt.description: Timestamp recording when this user profile was initially created in the system.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp recording the last time this user profile's information was updated.

Room.title: Room
Room.description: Represents a physical computer laboratory room available for booking and usage within the NEU campus. Rooms are named from M101 to M111.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Room entity.

name.description: The official designation or name of the laboratory room (e.g., 'M101', 'M102', ..., 'M111').

description.description: A brief description of the room, typically confirming its nature as a 'Computer Laboratory'.

qrCodeIdentifier.description: A unique string or identifier associated with this room, used by the system to generate or retrieve its specific QR code for scanning by professors.

createdAt.description: Timestamp recording when this room record was initially created in the system.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp recording the last time this room's information was updated.

RoomLog.title: RoomLog
RoomLog.description: Records individual usage sessions of a laboratory room by a professor, tracking start and end times, and session status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RoomLog entity.

professorId.description: Reference to the unique identifier of the UserProfile (professor) who initiated this room usage session.

roomId.description: Reference to the unique identifier of the Room entity that was used in this session.

startTime.description: Timestamp indicating the precise moment when the room usage session began.

endTime.description: Timestamp indicating the precise moment when the room usage session ended. This field will be null if the session is still active.

status.description: The current state of the room usage session. Can be 'Active', 'Completed', or 'Cancelled'.

createdAt.description: Timestamp recording when this room log entry was initially created in the system.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp recording the last time this room log entry's information was updated.

/user_profiles/{userId}.description: Stores individual user profiles including name, email, role, QR string, and blocked status.

/rooms/{roomId}.description: Contains details for each physical computer laboratory room (M101-M111).

/admin_roles/{adminUid}.description: A dedicated collection for explicit administrator role checking in Security Rules.
